task_completion.description: Load the Atlanta_Outbreak.csv dataset into the Epi Info 7 Map module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Epi Info 7 Map interface is visible, and a dialog or the layer manager shows 'Atlanta_Outbreak.csv' as the loaded data source.

task_completion.description: Configure the map layer to position cases using Latitude and Longitude.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The layer configuration dialog shows 'Latitude' selected for the Latitude/Y field and 'Longitude' selected for the Longitude/X field, or case points are successfully rendered on the map canvas.

task_completion.description: Enable the Time Lapse feature in the map layer configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A time-lapse control panel, playback slider, or a checked box enabling time-lapse animation is visible in the Epi Info 7 interface.

task_completion.description: Set the time variable for the Time Lapse feature to OnsetDate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The time-lapse configuration dialog or layer properties explicitly shows 'OnsetDate' selected as the time or animation variable.

task_completion.description: Save the resulting map configuration as outbreak_spread.map7 in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the filename 'outbreak_spread.map7' being saved in the Documents folder, or the Epi Info 7 window title bar displays 'outbreak_spread.map7'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Epi Info 7 GUI to configure the map rather than manually writing an XML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Epi Info 7 Map graphical interface, dialog boxes, and menus, rather than a text editor (e.g., Notepad) or terminal window.

integrity.description: The agent actively loaded the CSV data and configured the layer rather than opening a pre-made map file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the process of adding a data layer, selecting the CSV file, and mapping the variables in the GUI.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Epi Info 7 software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard Epi Info 7 Map interface (ribbons, layer manager, map canvas) is clearly visible and being manipulated.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Epi Info 7 uses an XML-based .map7 format for saving map configurations. The task requires loading 'Atlanta_Outbreak.csv', setting geographic coordinates to 'Latitude' and 'Longitude', and enabling the Time Lapse feature using 'OnsetDate' as the time variable. The final file must be saved as 'outbreak_spread.map7' in the C:\Users\Docker\Documents directory.
